entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'The WiX/NSIS Installer Bootstrapper (VC++ redist check, VulkanRT install, start menu shortcuts)
The Auto-Update Protocol (JSON manifest fetch, signature verification, atomic swap via SelfPatchEngine)
Enterprise License Enforcement Wiring (HWID binding, check against enterprise_license.cpp)
Long-duration soak tests

Fuzzing of JSON-RPC and LSP bridge

Plugin signature enforcement (if not already present)

Distributed swarm reconciliation layer

External audit

Plugin trust boundary (if QuickJS extensions can execute arbitrary native code).

Long-run memory fragmentation under patch churn.

Swarm consistency if distributed execution grows.

After initiate the Gauntlet Stress Test'
